page_layout.left: Column Specifications list + View… / Add… / Delete

intelligence_notes: Specs page list matches Monitor Active set (14 rows)
Add… opens Column Specification Types catalog (already learned)
Assist READs detail fields via COM; writes Active/Goal/Estimate via Specs Summary path
Empty yellow detail cells in screenshot = no row properly selected or new-spec draft named T-100 — select a list row to see values
Default Basis Molar on T-100; product rates still shown as USGPM on Monitor (worksheet units)
